title: Golden Crispy Canadian Green Pepper Skillet
description: A nutty and crispy Canadian dish featuring green pepper, miso-marinate, and ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This meal-prep friendly recipe is easy to make and packed with flavor.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the green peppers and cook until they are tender and lightly browned.
In a small bowl, whisk together the miso paste and maple syrup until smooth.
Pour the miso mixture over the peppers and onions, and stir to combine.
Add the chickpeas, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the chickpeas are heated through and the mixture is crispy.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
